summary: Planning from the hydrated preflight artifact only; no GitHub mutations are proposed because this inventory shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with unresolved proof/review blocker; keep it tracked independently instead of closing or merging.
Focused candidate with useful code and unresolved proof/CI blockers; keep it related to its own linked context rather than close.
Maintainer-owned PR with sufficient proof but explicit maintainer review/conflict handling needed; no safe close/merge/fix action is allowed in this job.
Active contributor PR with useful code, green checks, and a remaining maintainer scope decision; no close action is appropriate.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with focused non-security work and proof, but draft state and maintainer review make this a human decision, not inventory cleanup.

needs_human: #88876: maintainer-owned CI/snapshot PR needs maintainer review and conflict handling; merge/fix are blocked in this job.
